properties.title: Azure Virtual Desktop - Add Session Hosts

options.text: Deploy Azure Virtual Desktop session hosts into an existing host pool resource group. Select the target host pool and configure naming, network, image, and identity settings below.

link.label: Learn more about AVD Session Hosts

elements.name: subscription
elements.label: Subscription
elements.toolTip: Select the subscription containing the target host pool and resources. This is used to query available host pools, virtual networks, and other resources.

elements.name: hostPool
elements.label: Host Pool
elements.toolTip: Select the existing AVD host pool to add session hosts to.

transforms.list: sort_by(value, &displayName)[?name!='global' && !contains(displayName, '(Stage)')] | [*].{label: displayName, value: { displayName: displayName, name: name }}

elements.name: location
elements.label: Region
elements.toolTip: Select the Azure region where session hosts will be deployed. Defaults to the host pool region.

elements.name: timeZone
elements.label: Virtual Machines Time Zone
elements.toolTip: Select the time zone for the virtual machines.

allowedValues.label: (UTC+01:00) Amsterdam, Berlin, Bern, Rome, Stockholm, Vienna

options.text: Specify the VM name prefix and starting index. VMs will be named <prefix><zero-padded-index>, e.g., prefix 'avdvm-' with index 1 and 2-digit padding yields 'avdvm-01', 'avdvm-02'. The starting index is auto-calculated from the last existing session host when a host pool is selected.

elements.name: virtualMachineNamePrefix
elements.label: Virtual Machine Name Prefix
elements.toolTip: Provide a VM name prefix. Combined with the index padding, the total length cannot exceed 15 characters.

validations.message: Only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores are allowed. Cannot start with a hyphen or underscore, or consist entirely of digits.
The prefix length plus the index padding cannot exceed 15 characters total.

elements.name: index
elements.label: Starting Index
elements.toolTip: Select the starting number for the first VM in this batch. Auto-calculated as last session host index + 1 when a host pool with existing hosts is selected.

elements.name: indexPadding
elements.label: Index Padding (number of digits)
elements.toolTip: Select the number of digits used for the VM name index suffix (e.g., 2 = '01', 3 = '001'). Must match existing session hosts if adding to a pool.

elements.name: count
elements.label: Number of Virtual Machines
elements.toolTip: Select the number of session hosts to deploy in this batch.

elements.name: credentialsKeyVault
elements.label: Credentials Key Vault
elements.toolTip: Select the Key Vault containing the required secrets: 'VirtualMachineAdminUserName', 'VirtualMachineAdminPassword', and (for domain-joined deployments) 'DomainJoinUserPrincipalName' and 'DomainJoinUserPassword'.

elements.name: solution
elements.label: Identity Provider
elements.defaultValue: [if(equals(steps('basics').hostsRGProps.tags.vmIdentityType, 'EntraId'), 'Entra Id (Cloud Only Identities)', if(contains(steps('basics').hostsRGProps.tags.vmIdentityType, 'ActiveDirectory'), 'Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS)', if(contains(steps('basics').hostsRGProps.tags.vmIdentityType, 'CloudOnly'), 'Entra Kerberos (Cloud Only Identities) (Preview)', if(contains(steps('basics').hostsRGProps.tags.vmIdentityType, 'Kerberos'), 'Entra Kerberos (Hybrid Identities)', 'Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS)'))))]
elements.toolTip: Choose the identity solution for session hosts. Must match the configuration used by the existing host pool.

allowedValues.label: Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS)
allowedValues.description: Session hosts will be domain-joined to an ADDS domain. Users are sourced from ADDS.

allowedValues.label: Entra Domain Services
allowedValues.description: Session hosts will be joined to Microsoft Entra Domain Services.

allowedValues.label: Entra Id (Cloud Only Identities)
allowedValues.description: Session hosts join Entra ID only. FSLogix uses storage account keys for authentication.

allowedValues.label: Entra Kerberos (Cloud Only Identities) (Preview)
allowedValues.description: Session hosts join Entra ID. FSLogix uses Entra Kerberos. Preview, Azure Commercial only.

allowedValues.label: Entra Kerberos (Hybrid Identities)
allowedValues.description: Users sourced from ADDS, session hosts join Entra ID. FSLogix uses Entra Kerberos.

elements.name: domainName
elements.label: Domain Name
elements.toolTip: Provide the fully qualified domain name (FQDN) to join session hosts to.

constraints.validationMessage: Provide a valid fully qualified domain name.

elements.name: ouPath
elements.label: OU Path
elements.toolTip: Organizational Unit distinguished name for session host computer objects. Leave empty for the default Computers container.

options.text: Intune Enrollment is not available in Azure Secret or Azure Top Secret cloud environments.

elements.name: intuneEnrollment
elements.label: Intune Enrollment
elements.toolTip: Automatically enroll session hosts in Microsoft Intune during deployment.

transforms.confidentialVMSizes: value[?resourceType == 'virtualMachines' && capabilities[?name == 'ConfidentialComputingType'].value | [0] != null] | [?restrictions[?type == 'Location'].type | [0] != 'Location'] | [?capabilities[?name == 'CpuArchitectureType'].value | [0] != 'Arm64'] |[*].{label:name, value:name, description:join(' | ', [join(' ', [capabilities[?name == 'vCPUs'].value | [0], 'vCPUs']), join(' ', [capabilities[?name == 'MemoryGB'].value | [0], 'GB RAM'])])}
transforms.genericVMSizes: value[?resourceType == 'virtualMachines' && capabilities[?name == 'AcceleratedNetworkingEnabled'].value | [0] == 'True'] | [?restrictions[?type == 'Location'].type | [0] != 'Location'] | [?capabilities[?name == 'CpuArchitectureType'].value | [0] != 'Arm64'] |[*].{label:name, value:name, description:join(' | ', [join(' ', [capabilities[?name == 'vCPUs'].value | [0], 'vCPUs']), join(' ', [capabilities[?name == 'MemoryGB'].value | [0], 'GB RAM'])])}

elements.name: source
elements.label: Image Source
elements.toolTip: Select whether to use a marketplace image or a custom image from an Azure Compute Gallery.

elements.name: offer
elements.label: Offer
elements.toolTip: Select the marketplace image offer.

elements.name: sku
elements.label: SKU
elements.toolTip: Select the marketplace image SKU. Filtered to Windows Enterprise and AVD-optimized SKUs.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('hosts').image.skuApi, (sku) => and(startsWith(sku.name, 'win'), or(contains(sku.name, 'ent'), contains(sku.name, 'avd')))), (sku) => parse(concat('{"label":"', sku.name, '","value":"', sku.name, '"}')))]

elements.name: gallerySubscription
elements.label: Compute Gallery Subscription
elements.toolTip: Select the subscription containing the Compute Gallery.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(steps('hosts').image.galleriesApi.value, (gal) => parse(concat('{"label":"', gal.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(gal.id, '/'), 4)), ', Location: ', gal.location, '","value":"', gal.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: securityType
elements.label: Security Type
elements.toolTip: Select the security type. TrustedLaunch is recommended for most deployments. ConfidentialVM provides hardware-based isolation.

elements.name: secureBootEnabled
elements.label: Enable Secure Boot
elements.toolTip: Secure boot protects VMs against boot kits, rootkits, and kernel-level malware.

elements.name: vTpmEnabled
elements.label: Enable vTPM
elements.toolTip: Virtual Trusted Platform Module validates VM boot integrity and stores keys and secrets securely.

elements.name: integrityMonitoring
elements.label: Integrity Monitoring
elements.toolTip: Enables cryptographic attestation and verification of VM boot integrity with monitoring alerts.

elements.name: diskSku
elements.label: OS Disk SKU
elements.toolTip: Select the managed disk type for the OS disk.

elements.name: diskSizeGB
elements.label: OS Disk Size (GB)
elements.toolTip: Select the OS disk size. Select 'Default' to use the image-defined size.

elements.name: sizeGeneric
elements.label: Virtual Machine Size
elements.toolTip: Select the VM size. Multi-session hosts typically use 4–24 vCPUs. Single-session hosts use 2+ vCPUs.

elements.name: sizeConfidentialVM
elements.label: Virtual Machine Size (Confidential VM)
elements.toolTip: Select the confidential VM size. Only sizes with confidential computing capabilities are listed.

elements.name: enableAcceleratedNetworking
elements.label: Enable Accelerated Networking
elements.toolTip: Provides low-latency, high-throughput networking. Requires a supported VM size and OS image.
elements.visible: [and(not(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM')), bool(coalesce(first(map(filter(first(map(filter(steps('hosts').resourceSkusApi.value, (sku) => contains(sku.name, if(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM'), steps('hosts').specs.sizeConfidentialVM, steps('hosts').specs.sizeGeneric))), (sku) => sku.capabilities)), (sku) => equals(sku.name, 'AcceleratedNetworkingEnabled')), (sku) => sku.value)), false)), or(equals(steps('hosts').image.source, 'marketplace'), bool(coalesce(steps('hosts').image.imageDefinitionApi.transformed.IsAcceleratedNetworkSupported, false))))]

elements.name: virtualNetwork
elements.label: Virtual Network
elements.toolTip: Select the virtual network for session host NICs. Filtered to the selected region.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('hosts').network.virtualNetworksApi.value, (vnet) => equals(vnet.location, steps('basics').location.name)), (vnet) => parse(concat('{"label":"', vnet.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(vnet.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":{"name":"', vnet.name, '","id":"', vnet.id, '"}}')))]

elements.name: subnet
elements.label: Subnet
elements.toolTip: Select the subnet for the session host NICs.

elements.name: enableIPv6
elements.label: Enable IPv6
elements.toolTip: Enable IPv6 support on the network interface. Edge case scenario, not recommended for most deployments.

elements.name: availability
elements.label: Availability Option
elements.toolTip: Select the availability configuration for the virtual machines. Must match existing session host configuration when adding to a host pool.

constraints.allowedValues: [if(empty(first(map(first(map(filter(steps('hosts').resourceSkusApi.value, (sku) => contains(sku.name, if(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM'), steps('hosts').specs.sizeConfidentialVM, steps('hosts').specs.sizeGeneric))), (sku) => sku.locationInfo)), (sku) => sku.zones))), parse('[{"label":"No infrastructure redundancy required","value":"None"},{"label":"Availability Sets","value":"AvailabilitySets"}]'), parse('[{"label":"Availability Zones","value":"AvailabilityZones"},{"label":"Availability Sets","value":"AvailabilitySets"},{"label":"No infrastructure redundancy required","value":"None"}]'))]

elements.name: availabilityZones
elements.label: Select Availability Zones
elements.toolTip: Select the availability zones to distribute session hosts across.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(first(map(first(map(filter(steps('hosts').resourceSkusApi.value, (sku) => contains(sku.name, if(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM'), steps('hosts').specs.sizeConfidentialVM, steps('hosts').specs.sizeGeneric))), (sku) => sku.locationInfo)), (sku) => sku.zones)), (zone) => parse(concat('{"label":"Zone ', zone, '","value":"', zone, '"}')))]

options.text: Azure Dedicated Host provides physical servers able to host one or more virtual machines assigned to your subscription. Required in some IL5 environments. Click for more information.

elements.name: deployToDedicatedHosts
elements.label: Deploy to Dedicated Hosts
elements.toolTip: Deploy VMs to existing Azure Dedicated Host(s). When enabled, the Availability section above is ignored.

elements.name: dedicatedHostGroup
elements.label: Dedicated Host Group
elements.toolTip: Select the dedicated host group. VMs will be placed in this group using automatic host selection unless a specific host is chosen below.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('hosts').dedicatedHosts.hostGroupsApi.value, (hg) => equals(hg.location, steps('basics').location.name)), (hg) => parse(concat('{"label":"', hg.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(hg.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', hg.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: dedicatedHost
elements.label: Dedicated Host (optional — leave blank for auto-placement)
elements.toolTip: Optionally select a specific dedicated host. Leave blank to use automatic placement within the host group.

options.text: Encryption at host enhances Azure Disk Storage Server-Side Encryption to ensure that all temp disks and disk caches are encrypted at rest.

elements.name: encryptionAtHost
elements.label: Encryption At Host
elements.toolTip: Enable encryption of temp disks and disk caches on the VM host.

options.text: The 'Encryption At Host' feature is not registered in your subscription. Follow the link to enable it before deploying.

elements.name: confidentialVMOSDiskEncryption
elements.label: Confidential OS Disk Encryption
elements.toolTip: Binds OS disk encryption keys to the virtual machine's TPM. Only available with Confidential VM security type.

elements.name: selectDiskEncryptionSet
elements.label: Enable Customer-Managed Keys on OS Disk
elements.toolTip: Use an existing Disk Encryption Set to encrypt OS disks with customer-managed keys.

elements.name: existingDiskEncryptionSet
elements.label: Disk Encryption Set
elements.toolTip: Select the existing Disk Encryption Set to use for OS disk encryption.

options.text: Optionally customize your session host deployment by overriding the AVD Agent download sources and/or adding custom scripts or software to install during deployment.

elements.name: customizeAgentDownload
elements.label: Customize Agent Download Sources
elements.toolTip: Override default AVD Agent and Boot Loader download URLs. Useful for air-gapped environments or custom artifact hosting.

elements.name: addCustomScripts
elements.label: Add Custom Scripts or Software
elements.toolTip: Run custom scripts or install software on session hosts during deployment.

options.text: Optionally select a storage account and blob container hosting your artifacts, and a User Assigned Managed Identity with 'Storage Blob Data Reader' access. If specified, you can provide blob names instead of full URLs in the fields below.

elements.name: storageAccountSubscription
elements.label: Storage Account Subscription
elements.toolTip: Select the subscription containing the artifacts storage account.

elements.name: storageAccount
elements.label: Artifacts Storage Account
elements.toolTip: Select the storage account containing your deployment artifacts.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(steps('hosts').customizations.storageAccountsApi.value, (sa) => parse(concat('{"label":"', sa.name, '","description":"Location: ', sa.location, ' | Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(sa.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":{"id":"', sa.id, '","blobEndpoint":"', sa.properties.primaryEndpoints.blob, '"}}')))]

elements.name: container
elements.label: Artifacts Container
elements.toolTip: Select the blob container containing your artifact files.

elements.name: managedIdentity
elements.label: Storage Access User Assigned Identity
elements.toolTip: Select a User Assigned Identity with 'Storage Blob Data Reader' role on the artifacts storage account.

elements.name: agentBootLoaderUrl
elements.label: [if(empty(steps('hosts').customizations.storageAccount), 'AVD Agent Boot Loader URL', 'AVD Agent Boot Loader URL or Blob Name')]
elements.toolTip: Full URL or blob name for the AVD Agent Boot Loader MSI installer.

elements.name: agentUrl
elements.label: [if(empty(steps('hosts').customizations.storageAccount), 'AVD Agent URL', 'AVD Agent URL or Blob Name')]
elements.toolTip: Full URL or blob name for the AVD Agent MSI installer.

options.text: Specify each customization's name, blob name (or full URI), and optional arguments. These are executed via Run Command on each session host before it is registered with the host pool.

validations.message: Must be 1–20 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores/periods. Cannot start or end with a special character.

options.text: This host pool is a Personal host pool. Personal host pools use local profiles stored directly on each session host. FSLogix configuration is not applicable and will be skipped.

elements.name: configureSessionHosts
elements.label: Configure FSLogix on Session Hosts
elements.toolTip: Configure FSLogix profile registry settings on the session hosts during deployment.

elements.name: fslogixContainerType
elements.label: FSLogix Container Type
elements.toolTip: Select the FSLogix container type.

elements.name: sizeInMBs
elements.label: FSLogix VHD/VHDX Max Size (MB)
elements.toolTip: Set the maximum size of FSLogix profile containers in megabytes.

elements.name: storageService
elements.label: Storage Service
elements.toolTip: Select the storage service hosting the FSLogix file shares.

options.text: Select one or more existing Azure Files storage accounts in the same region as the session hosts. Session hosts will be configured to store user profiles on these accounts.

elements.name: existingLocalStorageAccounts
elements.label: Local Storage Accounts
elements.toolTip: Select one or more storage accounts hosting FSLogix file shares in the session host region.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('userProfiles').azureFiles.storageAccountsApi.transformed.list, (sa) => equals(sa.location, steps('basics').location.name)), (sa) => parse(concat('{"label":"', sa.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(sa.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', sa.id, '"}')))]

options.text: Optionally select existing storage accounts in a remote region for FSLogix Cloud Cache active/active disaster recovery.

elements.name: remoteLocation
elements.label: Remote Storage Region
elements.toolTip: Select the remote region where the Cloud Cache secondary storage accounts are located.

elements.name: existingRemoteStorageAccounts
elements.label: Remote Storage Accounts
elements.toolTip: Optionally select remote storage accounts for Cloud Cache DR.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('userProfiles').azureFiles.storageAccountsApi.transformed.list, (sa) => equals(sa.location, steps('userProfiles').azureFiles.remoteLocation)), (sa) => parse(concat('{"label":"', sa.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(sa.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', sa.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: netAppSubscription
elements.label: NetApp Files Subscription
elements.toolTip: Select the subscription containing the Azure NetApp Files volumes.

elements.name: localNetAppAccount
elements.label: Local NetApp Account
elements.toolTip: Select the NetApp account in the session host region.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('userProfiles').azureNetAppFiles.netAppAccountsApi.value, (account) => equals(account.location, steps('basics').location.name)), (account) => parse(concat('{"label":"', account.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(account.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', account.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: localCapacityPool
elements.label: Local Capacity Pool
elements.toolTip: Select an existing capacity pool from the selected NetApp account.

elements.name: localVolumes
elements.label: Local Volume(s)
elements.toolTip: Select the volume(s) for FSLogix containers. Select both profile and office volumes if using Profile & Office Container type.

elements.name: remoteNetAppAccount
elements.label: Remote NetApp Account
elements.toolTip: Optionally select a NetApp account in a remote region for Cloud Cache.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('userProfiles').azureNetAppFiles.netAppAccountsApi.value, (account) => not(equals(account.location, steps('basics').location.name))), (account) => parse(concat('{"label":"', account.name, '","description":"Location: ', account.location, ', Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(account.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', account.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: remoteCapacityPool
elements.label: Remote Capacity Pool
elements.toolTip: Select the remote capacity pool.

elements.name: remoteVolumes
elements.label: Remote Volume(s)
elements.toolTip: Select the remote volume(s) for Cloud Cache DR.

elements.name: enableMonitoring
elements.label: Enable AVD Insights and VM Insights Monitoring
elements.toolTip: Attach the Azure Monitor Agent and associate existing Data Collection Rules and a Data Collection Endpoint to the session hosts.

elements.name: monitoringSubscription
elements.label: Monitoring Resources Subscription
elements.toolTip: Select the subscription containing the existing monitoring resources (DCRs, DCE).

elements.name: avdInsightsDataCollectionRule
elements.label: AVD Insights Data Collection Rule
elements.toolTip: Select the existing AVD Insights Data Collection Rule for the session host region. Typically named 'microsoft-avdi-<region>'.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('monitoring').dataCollectionRulesApi.value, (dcr) => and(contains(dcr.name, 'avdi'), equals(dcr.location, steps('basics').location.name))), (dcr) => parse(concat('{"label":"', dcr.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(dcr.id, '/'), 4)), ', Location: ', dcr.location, '","value":"', dcr.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: vmInsightsDataCollectionRule
elements.label: VM Insights Data Collection Rule
elements.toolTip: Select the existing VM Insights Data Collection Rule for the session host region. Typically named 'MSVMI-<region>'.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('monitoring').dataCollectionRulesApi.value, (dcr) => and(contains(dcr.name, 'MSVMI'), equals(dcr.location, steps('basics').location.name))), (dcr) => parse(concat('{"label":"', dcr.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(dcr.id, '/'), 4)), ', Location: ', dcr.location, '","value":"', dcr.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: dataCollectionEndpoint
elements.label: Data Collection Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Select the existing Data Collection Endpoint for the session host region.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('monitoring').dataCollectionEndpointsApi.value, (dce) => equals(dce.location, steps('basics').location.name)), (dce) => parse(concat('{"label":"', dce.name, '","description":"Resource Group: ', first(skip(split(dce.id, '/'), 4)), ', Location: ', dce.location, '","value":"', dce.id, '"}')))]

parameters.enableAcceleratedNetworking: [if(and(not(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM')), bool(coalesce(first(map(filter(first(map(filter(steps('hosts').resourceSkusApi.value, (sku) => contains(sku.name, if(equals(steps('hosts').security.securityType, 'ConfidentialVM'), steps('hosts').specs.sizeConfidentialVM, steps('hosts').specs.sizeGeneric))), (sku) => sku.capabilities)), (sku) => equals(sku.name, 'AcceleratedNetworkingEnabled')), (sku) => sku.value)), false)), or(equals(steps('hosts').image.source, 'marketplace'), bool(coalesce(steps('hosts').image.imageDefinitionApi.transformed.IsAcceleratedNetworkSupported, false)))), steps('hosts').specs.enableAcceleratedNetworking, false)]
